name: org.openrewrite.golang.ChangeType
description: Change a Go type reference from one fully qualified name to another.
options: [{"name":"oldFullyQualifiedTypeName","type":"String","displayName":"Old fully qualified type name","description":"The fully qualified Go type name to replace.","example":"github.com/old/pkg.MyType","required":true},{"name":"newFullyQualifiedTypeName","type":"String","displayName":"New fully qualified type name","description":"The fully qualified Go type name to use instead.","example":"github.com/new/pkg.MyType","required":true}]

name: org.openrewrite.golang.ChangeMethodName
description: Rename method invocations matching a method pattern.
options: [{"name":"methodPattern","type":"String","displayName":"Method pattern","description":"A method pattern to match method invocations.","example":"fmt.Println(..)","required":true},{"name":"newMethodName","type":"String","displayName":"New method name","description":"The new name for the method.","example":"Printf","required":true}]

name: org.openrewrite.golang.search.FindTypes
description: Find all references to a given type.
options: [{"name":"fullyQualifiedTypeName","type":"String","displayName":"Fully qualified type name","description":"The fully qualified type name to search for.","example":"fmt.Stringer","required":true}]

name: org.openrewrite.golang.search.FindMethods
description: Find all method invocations matching a method pattern.
options: [{"name":"methodPattern","type":"String","displayName":"Method pattern","description":"A method pattern to match method invocations.","example":"fmt.Println(..)","required":true}]
